title: Monday Email and Activities - Item based

posts.author: BNBLEATHER (BNB)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello.
In the emails and autmations area, is it possible to only show things related to that task?
I have customers that I have to relay infomration backwards and forwards to but the customer will have multiple items and obviously it shows all of the emails shared between us not just the ones delegated to that task, is there a way about this?
